calendar.matters:
Notice Of Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-23-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Arthur C. Lipton, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, VENA SHOTIVEYARATANA and MARK WANNAVIROJ.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) OFF CENTER MINDS, LLC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Possession of Premises at 2080 Van Ness Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94109 no longer at issue.

Plaintiff Vena Shotiveyaratana sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Past-due rent: $26,000.00
Holdover damages: $14,083.55
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $13,000.00
Other: A credit of $13,000.00 received by the Plaintiffs after 3 day Notice given.
Total Judgment in the amount of $27,698.55
Judgment signed in open court.
